mechanics.text:
TRAITS
Fast Talk could be used t0 try t0 get the character to slip up and contradict his cover stony: Although character may purchase this trait several times t0 create multiple alternate identities for himself, maintaining multiple   identities   becomes  increasingly   difficult: Characters may assume one alternate identity without penalty. For every additional alternate identity character assumes apply Modifier t0 rolls made when the character is investigated or one of his identities questioned:
Specifically how bad and why are up to the player to work out: It is also perfectly acceptable (and rather common for player characters) that the bad reputation is undeserved The charac ter might have been framed _ could simple misunderstanding; The number of points Bad Reputation is worth indicate the magnitude of the reputation, and thus how large of an area the character might be known in: For point; the character'$ repu- tation only applies to single planet. 2-point reputation coV- ers region of space such as prefecture Or duchy; even small interstellar state such as the Free Rasalhague Republic 3-point reputation has spread across entire Successor State Or Other large realm: 4-point reputation is known across the entire Inner Sphere or all of Clan space while character with 5 point reputation might be heard of in any sector of pOp ulated space Note that this trait does not mean every single person in the area knows about the character, but ratner tnat there IS chance they  might: Characters with the Bad Reputation Trait receive Target Number Modifier Negotiation _ Protocol and Seduction Checks in the affected region_ Tne gamemaster can also apply this modifier to other TNs as he deems appropriate_ character with Bad Reputation is relatively infamous and well known result; the character receives +3 Modifier on skill   rolls that involve concealing his   identity; sucn Disguise_
AMBIDEXTROUS Cost: 2 An ambidextrous character can use both hands with equal ability: Tnis eliminates the +3 Modifier for using the off hand in combat, since the character has no off" hand Note that this trait does not grant character the ability to perform more than the usual number of actions in turn; Ambidextrous character could hold pistol each hand but could not make four attacks in turn; ne Koula still be restrict- ed t0 two Simple Actions in (urn and firing either gun one time would count as Simple Action.
AMNESIA value: 3 Quite rare in reality but staple of fiction, character with this trait has forgotten who he is and most of his persona histo ry; As such; he has no use of his skills (with the exception of the free skills Language ad Perception) after receiving this trait and must gradually "remember" what he can do_ Exactly how long this takes is Up to the gamemaster; good pace might be to allow the remembrance of one skill at the end of each play session_ most logically skiI the amnesiac either saw being used Or was forced t0 use untrained during the course of the adventure If the player and gamemaster agree the gamemaster can actually create the amnesiac skills and background using the Life Path sO that the player actually has no idea what his char- acter IS capable ot.
BRAVE Cost: character with this trait is very brave and especially resis tant t0 fear and shock: Any Action Checks that involve these ele ments   (gamemaster discretion) nave their  target  numbers reduced by 2.
COMBAT PARALYSIS Value: character with this trait tends t0 freeze Up in stressful sit- uations especially combat. Characters with this trait roll 3D10 and use the worst two dice wnen rolling Initiative in combat. Furthermore , delaying their actions combat inflicts Target Number Modifier rather than the usual +2_ In stressful situations outside actual combat where quick reactions are vital, the gamemaster can require character with this trait t0 make WIL Cneck t0 act in timely manner; tailure means the character delays for one turn (5 seconds) before act- ing:
ATTRACTIVE Cost: The character exceptionally attractive either physically; (ashion-wise even through pure  personality. Whatever the specific source this attractiveness helps the character many ways Dut most advantageous when dealing with those attracted to the character' gender; any CHA-related Action Checks involving someone aitracted t0 the character gender; the character gains Target Number Modifier: Even those attracted t0 the opposite gender are affected by attractive people, such that -1 Target Number Modifier applies in ay situation the gamemaster feels appearance might be beneficial.
COMBAT SENSE Cost: character with this trait is especially sharp and quick-wit- ted in stressful situations especially combat. Characters with this trait roll 3D10 and use the best two dice when rolling Initiative combat. Furthermore, delaying their actions in com- bat inflicts oniy +1 Target Number Modifier rather than the usual +2_
BAD REPUTATION Value: 1-5 Your character known far and wide
